recommendations.name: Emily Ward
recommendations.text: Rob has been supporting our organisation with web development, maintenance and general web support for nearly a year. He is extremely knowledgeable and really goes above and beyond. He offers thoughtful alternatives and creative solutions — often suggesting approaches we hadn't considered. A dream to work with.

recommendations.name: James Anthony
recommendations.text: I've worked with Rob for about four years as part of the digital team at Reach. He is highly professional, motivated, and embraces challenge. He makes complex goals understandable and achievable for all involved.

recommendations.name: Connor Marriott
recommendations.text: Rob consistently went above and beyond to deliver outstanding results for our client's web projects. His adaptability and quick problem-solving skills make him an asset in any situation.
